title: Declarative API Validation — +k8s:eachVal
text:
Description:
Declares a validation for each value in a map or list.
Stability Level:
Alpha
Payload:
<validation-tag>
: The tag to evaluate for each value.
Usage Example:
type
MyStruct
struct
{
// +k8s:eachVal=+k8s:minimum=1
MyMap
map
[
string
]
int
`json:"myMap"`
}
In this example,
eachVal
is used to specify that the
+k8s:minimum
tag should be applied to each element in
MyList
. This means that all fields in
MyStruct
must be >= 1.
